headline: EIA confirms Saudi shut-in at 9.1 million b/d, not 15M
body: The EIA Short-Term Energy Outlook for April 2026 confirms that shut-in production from Saudi Arabia averaged 9.1 million b/d in March 2026, rising to a peak of 9.1 million b/d in April. This contradicts widely circulated reports claiming 15M b/d shut-ins. The EIA advises market participants to rely on verified government data rather than unconfirmed media reports.
